description: Nick from the Solana Foundation Devrel team discusses recent updates including Geyser plugins, security enhancements, and new token extensions. Key changes involve improved logging for Geyser plugins [t=19:44], the addition of security.txt for better vulnerability reporting [t=93:04], and the introduction of a group member pointer token extension [t=161:53]. The conversation also covers SIMD88 enabling Core BPF programs, which aims to streamline validator client implementations [t=249:09].
topic_summary: Updates on Solana's development including Geyser plugin logging, security.txt integration, new token extensions, and SIMD88 for Core BPF programs.
